hero.titulo: Data Professional | Administrator | Future Systems Analyst
hero.subtitulo: Bridging strategic business vision with technical precision in Data Science and IT Governance.

sobre.paragrafo1: I'm a professional who combines a solid background in Business Administration with specialization in IT Governance and an ongoing degree in Systems Analysis and Development. My unique trajectory allows me to translate business challenges into effective technical solutions.
sobre.paragrafo2: With experience in strategic management, regulatory compliance, and data analysis, I've developed expertise in Python and SQL — going far beyond traditional ETL processes — as well as Power BI for executive visualization and Machine Learning for predictive modeling.
sobre.paragrafo3: My approach is results-oriented: I use data as a strategic asset, connecting technical analysis to corporate decision-making.

experiencia.desc3_item3: Management reports and performance indicators development

projeto1.resumo: Machine Learning model to predict diabetes risk based on clinical indicators, using classification techniques and cross-validation.
projeto1.descricao: This project uses advanced Machine Learning techniques to classify patients by their risk of developing diabetes. Using clinical indicators such as glucose level, BMI, age, and family history, the model identifies patterns that enable early intervention.
projeto1.insight1: Fasting glucose is the strongest predictor for risk classification
projeto1.insight2: Ensemble models (XGBoost) outperformed logistic regression in recall
projeto1.insight3: Balancing techniques (SMOTE) significantly improved positive case detection
projeto1.abordagem: Complete data science pipeline: exploratory analysis, feature engineering, model comparison (Logistic Regression, Random Forest, XGBoost), hyperparameter tuning with GridSearchCV, and evaluation with classification metrics (Precision, Recall, F1-Score, AUC-ROC).

projeto2.resumo: Predictive credit risk analysis combining statistical models with business rules, applying feature engineering and model interpretability.
projeto2.descricao: Credit risk analysis project that combines predictive models with business rules to assess the probability of default. The solution integrates transactional data with behavioral indicators for a holistic view of risk.
projeto2.insight1: Behavioral variables are more predictive than isolated demographic data
projeto2.insight2: Feature engineering with ratios and interactions increased discriminatory power by 15%
projeto2.insight3: SHAP values ensured transparency in credit decision interpretation
projeto2.insight4: Power BI integration enabled real-time risk indicator monitoring
projeto2.abordagem: Extraction and transformation via advanced SQL, predictive modeling with scikit-learn, feature importance analysis with SHAP, and risk indicator visualization in Power BI dashboards with custom DAX for credit KPIs.
